subcodes.first_line: O trustee of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter was received. That which thou didst write is verily the truth, if all would follow thy way [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء نامه واصل گردید آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی حق است اگر کل بسیرت تو
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @firmness in the Covenant, @business; financial; property matters, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
